body:
```
Options: --model opus --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-resume-on-limit-reset --tokens-budget-stats
🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-resume-on-limit-reset --tokens-budget-stats
```

=>

```
Options: --model opus
🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-resume-on-limit-reset --tokens-budget-stats
```

It will help to read it easier and faster, reduce duplication.

May be we can add appropriate emoji for user's requested options.

We should add one empty line between requested url and options.

Comment example: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1229#issuecomment-3860846361

Please collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), and propose possible solutions  (including known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: Make options communication clear from duplication in /solve command responses in hive-telegram-bot
